title: morisonia indica
intro: Morisonia indica, also known as the Indian or wild yam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Menispermaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to relieve menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. The health benefits of Morisonia indica include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural remedy for fever and pain relief. Herbal preparations of Morisonia indica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the skin for its medicinal benefits.
